## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Compliance checklist

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under `AGPL-3.0-only`.
- [ ] I did not add proprietary SDK/toolchain archives, signing material, credentials, tokens, or private user data.
- [ ] I did not add generated release artifacts such as HAP, APP, static libraries, or shared libraries.
- [ ] I updated `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` for any new copied assets, copied source, generated code, or external binaries.
- [ ] I checked trademark wording and did not imply official RustDesk or Huawei endorsement.
- [ ] I updated privacy/security documentation if the change affects data collection, logs, screen/audio capture, input, clipboard, file transfer, authentication, or server communication.
- [ ] I updated build/release documentation if the change affects CI, signing, native core downloads, or packaging.

## Testing

Describe the tests performed or explain why testing was not applicable.
